# WiFi Sensing — Third-Party References

This folder collects open-source projects related to **WiFi CSI-based sensing** for comparison, technical review, and research reference.

## Scope

Projects in this category may cover one or more of the following research areas:

- **WiFi CSI sensing**: Channel State Information extraction and processing
- **Activity recognition**: Human motion classification using WiFi signals
- **Fall detection**: Detection of fall events using passive WiFi sensing
- **Pose estimation**: Body pose or gesture inference from RF signals
- **Presence detection**: Occupancy and proximity sensing without cameras
- **Vital-sign monitoring**: Respiration rate and heart rate estimation from WiFi
- **Smart-home sensing**: Ambient intelligence and context-aware systems
- **Elderly monitoring**: Passive activity and anomaly detection for older adults

## Usage in This Repository

Projects listed here are included for:

- Literature review and state-of-the-art comparison
- Understanding sensing pipeline design patterns
- Technical review of signal processing and ML approaches
- Reproducibility testing of published baselines

**These projects are not part of the core fall-detection pipeline of this repository** unless explicitly stated in the main README.

## Validation Disclaimer

Performance claims (e.g., accuracy percentages, detection rates) from third-party projects are **not** automatically treated as validated. Any comparison with this repository's own results will be clearly documented with experimental context.

## License Notes

All projects in this folder remain under their original licenses. See individual project folders or the root [THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md](../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md) for details.
